parsed.production_notes: The image is entirely a graphic design composition with no photographic elements. It uses flat colors, simple shapes, and text to convey its message.

scenes.setting: Abstract digital background with geometric shapes and a blue/purple gradient.

panels.panel_visual_description: The image features an abstract background composed of geometric shapes and gradients in shades of blue and purple. Overlaid on this background are four distinct rectangular blocks with rounded corners, each in a different solid color: green, yellow, orange, and red. These blocks are arranged in a grid-like pattern, with the green block being the largest and positioned on the left. Thin, light-colored lines connect some of the blocks, suggesting a flow or progression. The overall composition is clean, modern, and graphic.

scenes.visual_description: The image is an infographic-style advertisement for an English learning app. The headline at the top reads 'Learn English with an AI that adapts to your vocabulary' in white text against a blue/purple gradient background. Below the headline are four colored blocks representing different English proficiency levels: A1 Beginner (green), A2 Elementary (yellow), B1 Intermediate (orange), and B2 Upper Intermediate (red). Each block contains a list of vocabulary words and phrases typical for that level. A 'START NOW' call-to-action button in bright green is located in the bottom right corner.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Learn English with an AI that adapts to your vocabulary

A1 Beginner
• hello / hi / bye
• name, age, country
• yes / no / please / thank you
• food, water, coffee
• work, home, family
• good, bad, big, small
• I like / I don't like
• What is this?
• I want / I need
• numbers 1-100, colors, days

A2 Elementary
• usually / sometimes
• yesterday / tomorrow / now
• can / can't / have to
• go, come, take, say
• friend, weekend, movie
• I think / I guess
• how much? / how many?
• because / but / and
• do the dishes, make the bed
• I'm tired / I'm hungry

B1 Intermediate
• I've been / I've done
• kind of / really / actually
• honestly / to be honest
• depends / not sure
• busy, excited, frustrated, worried
• What do you mean?
• avoid / take care of
• in my opinion / I agree / I disagree
• habits, goals, challenges
• daily routine, healthy lifestyle, bad habits

B2 Upper Intermediate
• finally / basically / obviously
• figure out / deal with / run out of
• confident / overwhelmed / disappointed
• could have / should have / would have
• as far as I know / as soon as possible
• to be honest / to tell the truth
• at the end of the day / make sense
• mindset / attention span / multitasking
• small difference, long-term solution
• as far as I know / as soon as possible

START NOW
